stem:
One of the earliest known maps is a Babylonian clay tablet thought to be almost 4,500 years old. The map _______ the area of a plot of land, shows a river valley, and includes the cardinal directions.

Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
explanation: The subject “The map” is singular and takes the singular present-tense verb “describes,” which also matches the other verbs in the list (“shows,” “includes”). The plural forms “describe,” “have described,” and “are describing” don’t agree with the singular subject.
